title: cleistes ayangannensis
intro: Cleistes ayangannensis, also known as the Ayanganna Cleistes or Yellow Cleistes, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleistes ayangannensis include its potential to treat various health issues such as parasitic infections, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
